sections.content:

<function=python>

# Check current state

for n in seg['nodes']:

        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"{n['color']}: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check ascii around top-right frame
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nRegion (rows 22-32, cols 40-52):")
for i in range(22, 32):
    print(f"{i:2d}: {ascii_lines[i][40:52]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
